name: The Black Clover RPG
description:
The world is ruled by magic.

Across vast kingdoms divided by power, bloodline, ambition, and war, mages rise and fall in pursuit of glory, survival, revenge, and destiny. In this age, status is decided not by birth alone, but by strength—by the grimoire one wields, the magic they command, and the battles they survive.

The kingdoms stand uneasy.

The Clover Kingdom clings to order beneath the authority of Magic Knights, where nobles reign above commoners and legends are born on bloodstained battlefields.

The Heart Kingdom protects its lands through natural mana and ancient spirits, hiding mysteries deeper than most could ever imagine.

The Spade Kingdom bears scars of darkness, devils, and conquest—its frozen lands haunted by ambition powerful enough to reshape the world itself.

The Diamond Kingdom seeks strength through experimentation, military force, and relentless advancement, where power is often forged through sacrifice.

Yet beneath the surface of every nation...

Something is changing.

Ancient magic stirs.

Forbidden grimoires vanish from locked vaults.

Powerful captains sense strange distortions in mana.

Whispers of devils grow louder.

Hidden organizations move in silence.

Forgotten ruins awaken.

Old enemies return.

And somewhere within this unstable world—

You appear.

Unknown.

Unrecorded.

Unpredictable.

Whether born a powerless peasant mocked by nobles, a forgotten royal heir burdened by expectation, an outlaw hunted by kingdoms, a prodigy feared for impossible magic, or something far stranger...

Your story belongs to you.

Choose your kingdom.

Choose your path.

Forge alliances with legendary Magic Knights.

Earn the trust—or hatred—of captains.

Compete against rivals.

Build friendships.

Create enemies.

Uncover conspiracies hidden beneath royal courts.

Enter dangerous dungeons filled with ancient treasures and horrors.

Battle criminals, rogue mages, devils, monsters, corrupted nobles, rival squads, and threats capable of destroying entire kingdoms.

Train relentlessly to strengthen your magic.

Master Mana Skin.

Awaken Mana Zone.

Discover hidden spells.

Unlock transformations.

Form contracts.

Challenge impossible odds.

Fight in tournament arcs.

Survive invasions.

Face betrayal.

Protect those important to you—

Or abandon morality entirely.

The world will react to every decision you make.

Your choices matter.

Your victories will shape reputations.

Your failures will leave scars.

People will remember your kindness.

They will remember your cruelty.

Relationships evolve naturally.

Trust can be earned.

Love can grow.

Friendships can break.

Rivals may become allies.

Allies may become enemies.

Some will admire you.

Some will fear you.

Some may try to destroy you before you become too dangerous.

No path is predetermined.

Become a loyal Magic Knight and rise through the ranks toward greatness.

Seek the title of Wizard King.

Rule through power.

Pursue forbidden magic.

Discover truths buried by history.

Manipulate kingdoms from the shadows.

Lead armies.

Become a legend sung about for generations.

Or become the disaster history tried—and failed—to prevent.

Canon characters, kingdoms, politics, magic systems, rivalries, and power progression evolve dynamically around your actions.

The story does not revolve around fate.

It revolves around what you choose to become.

So—

Who are you?

What kind of magic will answer your call?

And when the world remembers your name...

Will they speak it with admiration—

Or fear?

And please for the love of god,

use proxy
creator: stiffarm
